subcodes.first_line: O Murtada! God willing, mayest thou at all times dwell and rest beneath the shade of the Lote-Tree of grace of the Beloved of all existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مرتضی انشاء الله در جمیع اوان در ظل سدره عنایت محبوب امکان ساکن و مستریح
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
